description: SLA thresholds for dataset freshness monitoring. Single source of truth for SLA configuration.
documentation: See CLAUDE.md section '🔒 Safety and Data Policy' for SLA semantics and usage.

HIGH.description: Critical datasets (inspections, violations). Alert if >14 days old.

MEDIUM.description: Important datasets (permits, ramps). Alert if >30 days old.

LOW.description: Reference datasets (mappluto, boundaries). Alert if >60 days old.

note: If these values change, update CLAUDE.md and tests/test_sla_config.py to keep all references in sync.
